# external/ — AI export drop-zone

Drop ChatGPT / Claude / other AI-assistant exports here (`.md`, `.txt`, `.pdf`) to ingest.

**Everything here is PROVISIONAL** (CLAUDE.md §6). An AI lore dump is a *lead*, not canon. Verify each claim against a primary source in `{{SOURCE_ROOT}}` before it earns a note in `entities/` with `status: canon`. Until then, anything synthesized from here is tagged `status: provisional` and shows up on the "not yet verified" dashboard in HOME.md.
